title: Software Engineering Intern
desc: Work with Google's core engineering team on real products. 3-month summer internship.

title: ML Research Assistant
desc: Assist in cutting-edge Machine Learning research focusing on predictive modeling and time series analysis.
eligibility: Final year students or graduates with strong Python and Math background.

title: Full Stack Developer (Fresher)
desc: Join the product team to build scalable B2B SaaS applications used by millions worldwide.

title: Cybersecurity Analyst Intern
desc: Work on national cybersecurity initiatives, focusing on penetration testing and secure key exchanges like Diffie-Hellman.
eligibility: 3rd year+ students. Preference for students with Cryptography coursework.

title: Smart Attendance System
desc: Face-recognition based attendance system to be developed and deployed in production on campus.
eligibility: Open to all semesters. Knowledge of Python and Flutter required.

title: Attendance System
desc: Face-recognition based attendance system to be developed and deployed in production on campus.
eligibility: Open to all semesters. Knowledge of Python and Flutter required.
